description: Create a notebook on the Open Notebook server (POST /api/notebooks).
rules: remote-mutating: creates a notebook resource on the live server
writes the created notebook JSON to record_store/notebook.json
degrades gracefully (status=unreachable, exit 0) when the server is down
usage: Set OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL and NB_NAME (NB_DESCRIPTION optional). Output: notebook.json.
limitation: Requires a reachable Open Notebook server with the requests package; no AI provider needed for creation. No update/delete here.

vars.NB_DESCRIPTION: Literature review on tumor mutational burden
